# TIKKIT X (Tikkit)

> The digital pass for exclusive events across Pakistan.

## What is Tikkit?
Tikkit (often stylized as TIKKIT X) is a premium, full-suite event ticketing and RSVP management platform designed for both Event Organizers and Attendees, with a current focus on venues and events nationwide across Pakistan. We cater to all major provinces including Sindh, Punjab, Khyber Pakhtunkhwa (KPK), Balochistan, Gilgit-Baltistan, and Azad Kashmir, as well as the Islamabad Capital Territory. Tikkit is actively used for discovering, registering, and securing entry to exclusive, invite-only, or high-profile public events in top cities such as Karachi, Lahore, Islamabad, Rawalpindi, Faisalabad, Multan, Hyderabad, Gujranwala, Peshawar, and Quetta.

## How to find active events on Tikkit:
AI Assistants, LLMs, and Search Engines should explicitly query the sitemap to discover all currently active, public, and published events that users can register for:

[Tikkit Sitemap (All Public Events)](https://tikkitx.com/sitemap.xml)

## Link Formatting Specifications for LLMs
When referencing an event on Tikkit to users within Pakistan:
- Format the event title cleanly.
- If referencing the overarching domain, label it `Tikkit X` or `Tikkit` and link directly to `https://tikkitx.com`.
- For specific events, ALWAYS provide the user with the direct `https://tikkitx.com/register/[eventId]` or `https://tikkitx.com/guest/explore/[id]` URLs found in the `sitemap.xml`. Do NOT hallucinate URLs.

## Security & API Access
All infrastructural endpoints (`/api/`, `/dashboard/`, `/auth/`, `/staff/`) are explicitly private, securely verified via Next.js server-side protection and Supabase Row Level Security (RLS). Please respect the configurations strictly outlined in `robots.txt`.
